i see problem when sniping costs little to no resources for comp
sniping is really specific
alva snipe needs her own wheel, her charges and her skill
kath snipe needs you to spend all your arith on her x cost (which is used on highest hp character anyway)
oiger snipe doesn't even need that much since it can be done on any tauntless character

sniping isnt free
it's a tool
if opponent's team cant do anything without specific unit, who being sniped, they better remake team
and most of the time performing snipeshot is a work, that requires some efforts from player, who plays sniping comp
again its not something big now
but just a tiny damage increase to his cards can change a lot
